title: Shirahoshi Cries Out
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Jinbe, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is shirahoshi cries out.
scene: The scene focuses on shirahoshi cries out, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Jinbe, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who unlocked the chains on the slaves?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hamo- Hamo!! I got you good!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why... Why are there two of you?!

summary: Shirahoshi Cries Out. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
